concerns.description: Rate limiter memory usage under load: unbounded per-user state could grow with many concurrent users
concerns.fix: Consider TTL-based eviction or max entries cap; document in production runbook

concerns.description: WebSocket reconnection backoff strategy uses fixed 1s base; may need tuning for high-latency networks
concerns.fix: Make backoff configurable; consider jitter for thundering herd

nits.description: Consider extracting magic number 100 to shared config constant

architecture_assessment: Design is sound: rate limiter before pusher, WebSocket handler decoupled from business logic. Recommend monitoring memory usage in production and adding metrics for reconnection rate.
